caption: A man with glasses and a grey, spiky wig wears a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He is seated in a studio setting, wearing black headphones and speaking into a large black microphone positioned in front of him. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a clothing rack displaying various garments, including a shirt with the brand "LEE" visible. A white logo and text appearing on the left and right sides of the screen reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position and attire, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he speaks. The camera angle and lighting remain consistent throughout the frames, capturing the man from the chest up against the detailed studio backdrop.
